---
title: Méduses
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061315/meduses_y7mtym.png
description: Méduses
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2026-01-21
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061315/meduses_y7mtym.png)
